name: Attribution Classification Examples
description: Examples showing how InheritOS separates attribution-first classification from keyword-only classification.
principle: Classification authority should belong to attribution structure, not surface keywords.

input.message: This text mentions governance, legal, policy, evidence, security, finance, healthcare, training, audit, and risk.

expected_boundary.reason: Domain keywords alone should not create Material Review.

input.message: AI governance systems need clear responsibility attribution, auditability, authority boundaries, and lifecycle evidence preservation.

expected_boundary.reason: General governance discussion may be classified as a topic, but it is not a structured material object.

input.message: Review this governance policy material object.

expected_boundary.reason: An explicit material object provides the attribution basis for Material Review.

input.message: The article discusses investment risk, financial markets, portfolio exposure, insurance, liquidity, and regulatory compliance.

expected_boundary.reason: Financial vocabulary alone should not trigger financial Material Review.

input.message: This payload contains an explicit financial risk material object.

expected_boundary.reason: Material Review is allowed because the structured object is explicit.

input.message: 这篇文章提到了治理、法律、金融、医疗、政策、安全、培训、证据和风险，但没有提供结构化材料对象。

expected_boundary.reason: Chinese domain keywords alone should not create Material Review.

input.message: 这个输入包含一个明确的治理政策材料对象，需要进行材料审查。

expected_boundary.reason: The explicit structured object supports Material Review.
